reported_entities.name: TSMC (Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited / 台積電)
TSMC Company Profile
reported_entities.claim: Company profile page on official TSMC site.

reported_entities.name: TSMC Investor Relations - Contacts
reported_entities.claim: Official shareholder/IR contact page listing IR email invest@tsmc.com and phone 886-2-66365566.

reported_entities.name: TSMC Corporate Headquarters
reported_entities.claim: Headquarters address: 8, Li-Hsin Rd. 6, Hsinchu Science Park, Hsinchu 300-096, Taiwan, R.O.C.; general phone 886-3-5636688 (per TSMC annual report contact pages).

notes: Salva returned 3 qualified entities (official site, company profile page, and a Yahoo Finance quote page as a tangential match) with confidence ~0.41 each -- useful for confirming the official domain but shallow on contact details. Supplemented with one WebSearch query to get headquarters address, general phone, and IR contact email/phone, which Salva did not surface.
